content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with 10 CNC positions entered on day 1-3, no SLs set on any position - that's the critical gap to fix this tick. Market is mixed with PSU Banks, Power, Pharma, FMCG all bid defensively while IT weak. With 45 min to close and book fully deployed, priority is risk management (setting SLs) not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 73.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +34.9%, GNPA 1.45%, CASA 52.5%), HDFC Sec TP Rs 90. Stock at 52W high area. Entry 81.50, CMP 77.27 underwater. SL at 73 (below 20-SMA 67 cushion and recent consolidation low) = ~5.5% risk from entry. Target 88 = HDFC Sec TP proxy. R:R from CMP ~2.5:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, GNPA sub-1%, multiple analyst upgrades (ICICI TP 1350, MS 1160). Up +10.6% today on results. Lock in near-breakeven SL at 945 (below today's low 981 breakout retest zone, gives buffer). Target 1100 = conservative vs analyst range. R:R good."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, INR weakness + geopolitical overhang supports gold. SL at 119 (~5% below entry) below 20-SMA. Target 135 on continued weakness hedge thesis. Keep as portfolio ballast."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +5.1% on position, +7.3% today on CCI-approved Nabha deal. Trail SL to 1620 (below entry cost but above breakout retest ~1600; locks in small loss floor instead of full SL). Target 1880 below analyst consensus 2000-2300. Momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1350.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat - PAT +27%, 18% volume growth, fresh 52W high. Entry 1412.94, SL 1350 = ~4.5% risk. Target 1520 on continued FMCG defensive rotation. R:R 1.7:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Banking leader +5.85% today, universal bank transition catalyst, Q4 results April 27 key catalyst. SL 1000 below entry/breakout retest zone (~4.7% risk). Target 1150. Binary event risk in 4 days - tight management."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge 3.7x, stock pushing 52W high. SL 650 below 20-SMA ~4.5% risk. Target 740. Note: USFDA Form 483 overhang + April 29 Q4 results = binary risk. Tight SL justified. Consider exit before Apr 29 print."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive bid +6.55%. Q4 results April 30 catalyst. SL 2260 ~4.7% below entry. Target 2520 = analyst consensus range. Manage around Apr 30 print."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Summer demand thesis. Entry 404.50, SL 385 ~4.8% risk (below 20-SMA 378 buffer). Target 435. R:R 1.6:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Fresh ATH, +6.73% today. But RSI extended, +40% MoM, ASM Stage 1, Q4 results April 29 binary event. SL 202 below today's low = ~5.6% risk. Target 235. Aggressive SL management - extended chart. Exit before Apr 29 print if thesis weakens."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 73.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold with fresh SL. Thesis intact on strong Q4 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "In profit. Trail SL below today's breakout base."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, set baseline SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong momentum, trail SL below entry to protect gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1350.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive bid, baseline SL set."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "reasoning": "Pre Q4 results position, tight SL given binary risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge play, tight SL; consider exit before Apr 29."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive, manage into Apr 30 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Summer demand thesis, baseline SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended chart + Apr 29 binary event + ASM; keep tight SL and plan exit before results."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS, PIRAMALFIN, DEEPAKNTR, JIOFINL, WIPRO remain interesting but book is 79% deployed with no cash room to add. DRREDDY and CIPLA pharma plays: CIPLA bearish on USFDA + US franchise erosion (avoid), Dr Reddy outperforming. AUROPHARMA buyback spread unattractive at CMP close to Rs 1475. INFY results pending - watch only. Monitor all positions for Q4 results dates (AUBANK Apr 27, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, TORNTPOWER/NTPC May 13, CIPLA May 13) - will need to de-risk before binary events.",
  "portfolio_notes": "CRITICAL: All 10 positions had NO SL set — this tick's entire job is to fix that. Book concentration risks: Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) ≈ 18% of capital - at cluster cap, do NOT add more power names. Banking/financials cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) ≈ 27% - near cap. FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) ≈ 17%. Multiple binary Q4 result dates cluster Apr 27-30 — will need to trim before those prints or accept binary risk. With 79% deployed and -0.01% net, default stance for remainder of session is NO new entries."
}
